title: IPv4/IPv6 dual-stack — Headless Services without selector
text:
For
Headless Services without selectors
and without
.spec.ipFamilyPolicy
explicitly set, the
.spec.ipFamilyPolicy
field defaults to
RequireDualStack
.

To provision a dual-stack load balancer for your Service:
Set the
.spec.type
field to
LoadBalancer
Set
.spec.ipFamilyPolicy
field to
PreferDualStack
or
RequireDualStack
